Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}There somethin' worth lookin' at from here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I have no intention of relinquishing my abilities and living an empty life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}To continue existing as we are, or to die powerless...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I know how important this is to you, Takaya—to us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}If the Dark Hour disappears, we might forget everything that happened, won't we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I'd forget you and Chidori, the things we did together, our time at the facility... All of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I couldn't care less if that damned facility got erased from my memory.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Havin' this uncontrollable power forced on us... Watchin' everybody we knew disappear one by one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But there's just one thing I refuse to forget.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Back when I was trapped in that living hell, you spoke to me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Thanks to what you said, I learned how to keep myself going.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Your words gave my life meaning, Takaya.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}If I forget that, I won't have any reason to be alive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It may not be much of a purpose, compared to yours...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Well then, why don't we find out together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Whom will fate elect to choose... them, or us?[n]{f 1 1}
